public_reputation: Specialist who grades crystal output, reactor feed allotments, and contamination thresholds for Sheresh infrastructure.
appearance: Powerstone Refiner Vaska Neve carries the marks of powerstone refiner in crystalline chill: practical wear, maintained details, and a look that suggests they expect to be read before they are trusted.
manner: Carries the habits of a powerstone refiner whose work is visible through daily procedure, gatekeeping, and the practical pressures of Aurora Meadows.
daily_function: Performs the ongoing duties of powerstone refiner in and around Aurora Meadows, where the role has practical consequences even when nothing dramatic is happening.
current_agenda: Protect their footing in Aurora Meadows while steering current strain away from a public rupture they may not survive politically or materially.
hidden_pressure: A private obligation, debt, promise, or fear tied to mutational drift is narrowing their options faster than they admit.

adventure_hooks.summary: Powerstone Refiner Vaska Neve can draw the party into a practical problem centered on Aurora Meadows.
Powerstone Refiner Vaska Neve becomes useful when the party needs access, explanation, or relief tied to the work of a powerstone refiner.

support_scope_notes: Created from the estate and daily-life infrastructure execution patch to make polity-native estate operations usable at table scale.
public_signal: In public, Powerstone Refiner Vaska Neve is readable as a powerstone refiner tied to Aurora Meadows.

encounter_context.usual_environment: Aurora Meadows: role-relevant halls, counters, corridors, docks, archives, shrines, workshops, gates, or administrative rooms

first_impression: Powerstone Refiner Vaska Neve presents as someone shaped by the duties of a powerstone refiner and the daily pressures of Aurora Meadows.
what_they_want_from_strangers: Useful clarity, respect for the work of a powerstone refiner, and proof that strangers will not make Aurora Meadows harder to manage.
what_they_refuse: Powerstone Refiner Vaska Neve refuses careless disrespect, vague promises, and demands that threaten standing or workload.
how_they_create_problems: By enforcing the expectations of a powerstone refiner too rigidly, protecting reputation, or turning a small request into a larger obligation.
how_they_can_help: Powerstone Refiner Vaska Neve can open local doors, explain expectations, and redirect pressure before it hardens.
escalation_if_crossed: If crossed, Powerstone Refiner Vaska Neve adds scrutiny, delay, and locality-specific friction before direct punishment.
rumor_about_them: People say Powerstone Refiner Vaska Neve always knows more about Aurora Meadows than is immediately visible.
best_first_scene: A first encounter works best when the party needs guidance, access, or relief tied to powerstone refiner duties in Aurora Meadows.
social_texture: Powerstone Refiner Vaska Neve speaks like someone who has spent too long translating private stakes into acceptable public language. Around Aurora Meadows, people read them as spell-literate, aesthetically alert, and wary of magical contamination.
money_pressure: Their material pressure is tied to reagents; even when wealthy, they think in terms of loss, leverage, and what one bad week would expose.
status_anxiety: What they fear most is not simple failure but mutational drift becoming socially visible before they can contain it.
long_memory: They remember who made their work harder, who preserved dignity under strain, and who tried to force speed without bearing consequence.
obvious_tell: When pressure rises, Powerstone touches clothing, tools, or insignia before answering, as if checking that their role is still intact.
best_use_case: Use Powerstone Refiner Vaska Neve when the party needs a socially grounded face for Aurora Meadows: access, warning, delay, price, or reluctant help.
private_contradiction: They want to appear consistent, but their real choices are split between duty, self-protection, and preserving one relationship they cannot afford to lose.
